input:
Architecture Review — May 2, 2026
Attendees: Hana Novak, Ben Kowalski, Priya Sharma, Chloe Weiss

Topic: Connector architecture for Run 3
Hana: Proposing event-sourced connector model — each source emits L0Events. Decision: adopt. Owner: Hana. Design doc due May 10.
Ben: REST API is stable. v1.0.0 locked. No breaking changes until Run 5.
Priya: Pagination RFC approved. Merging Friday.
Chloe: MCP server prototype ready for review. Needs security audit by Security Team before v1.
